description: A plain candid nighttime operational photograph from Operation Tidal Wave, lit in deep blue tones with a single orange streetlight and vehicle taillights in the dark background. Two officers are shown from behind standing in a residential street, wearing tactical plate carriers over uniforms: the left vest reads 'POLICE,' the right vest reads 'STATE TROOPER,' both carrying rifles/long guns on slings. There is no on-image text overlay, slogan, or agency seal added by design; the only text is the printed labels on the officers' gear. The cinematic low-light composition documents a multi-agency immigration enforcement operation at night. Tweet context: ICE Miami and Florida law enforcement arrests during #OperationTidalWave, with CBP support.
notable_text: (no on-image text; vest labels POLICE and STATE TROOPER)
